articles.title: Tether Claims to Hold no Commercial Paper From Struggling Evergrande
articles.description: Stablecoin Tether says it does not hold any commercial paper from Evergrande in recent a statement. Evergrande, China’s second-largest property developer by sales, recently warned that it was in danger of defaulting on massive debts. Evergrande is trying to find a way to cut costs and sell off some of its assets to dig its way out.
